positives: Continuous insurance coverage for at least 5 years (2020-2024)
No cancellations in 4 of the last 5 years
concerns: Cancellation in 2022 with Zurich Insurance Group
Frequent carrier changes over the 5-year period (4 different carriers)
Elevated claim frequency in 2021 (15 claims) and 2024 (13 claims)
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 5-year claim count: 2020=6, 2021=15, 2022=4, 2023=10, 2024=13; total 48 claims over 5 years. Loss ratios not provided.

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history (2020-2024): 2024 Nationwide Insurance - premium 1,634,721.63, 13 claims, no cancellation. 2023 Berkshire Hathaway Guard - premium 1,476,849.96, 10 claims, no cancellation. 2022 Zurich Insurance Group - premium 1,369,245.71, 4 claims, cancelled. 2021 Nationwide Insurance - premium 1,487,006.51, 15 claims, no cancellation. 2020 CNA Financial - premium 1,581,292.51, 6 claims, no cancellation.
